title: Intricately Roasted Moroccan Turkey Ham Tagine
description: A low-fat, roasted Moroccan dish featuring turkey ham, perfect for meal prep and served in a bento box. This recipe combines the flavors of Morocco with the convenience of a portable meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the diced turkey ham to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Spread the turkey ham mixture on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the turkey ham is roasting, heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Once the turkey ham has finished roasting, add it to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and broth mixture.
Reduce the heat to low and let the tagine simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the Intricately Roasted Moroccan Turkey Ham Tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
